division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: Whenever the ownership of any vehicle for which a certificate of ownership has been issued without registration under Section 4452 is transferred, an application for transfer shall be made as provided in this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 2. Transfers of Title or Interest [5600 - 6105]
#### Article 3. Notice and Application [5900 - 5912]
##### § 5904

Whenever the ownership of any vehicle for which a certificate of ownership has been issued without registration under Section 4452 is transferred, an application for transfer shall be made as provided in this chapter.

*(Amended by Stats. 1961, Ch. 58.)*

subsections.text: Whenever the ownership of any vehicle for which a certificate of ownership has been issued without registration under Section 4452 is transferred, an application for transfer shall be made as provided in this chapter.
